events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`: a **pass** decision at low risk, since the closeout photos show routing/clearances/labels/supports/terminations matching the referenced detail with no open correction note. I flagged as a follow-up action (not a fail condition) that conductor ampacity/sizing per Table 310.16 depends on load calcs, ambient/conduit-fill corrections, and terminal temperature ratings (110.14(C)) that photos alone can't verify — that documentation should be confirmed before final sign-off.
